creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #13)

Avoiding : kldload -v -n sdt.ko

avoids all those messages that I reported.

Avoiding zfs.ko avoid a note about having only
2 kernel pages for the kernel stack, risking
overflow.

Other than those 2, I have reenabled loading
the other .ko's that I'd temporarily disabled
loading. (There are some that are historically
disabled --that still are.)
